content:
✨ WeClone | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To create a personalized AI digital avatar that mimics a user's communication style by fine-tuning an LLM on their chat history.
✨ Key Features: • End-to-end solution for creating digital avatars • Chat data export and preprocessing • LLM fine-tuning with chat history (including image data) • Integration with Telegram and other platforms (WhatsApp, Discord, Slack, WeChat)
📖 Summary: WeClone is a Python-based solution for creating a personalized AI digital avatar from chat history. It allows users to fine-tune Large Language Models (LLMs) with their chat logs, capturing their unique communication style, and then deploy this model as a chatbot, effectively bringing their digital self to life.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
